_description: Known tracking cookie definitions with descriptions, set-by information, purpose categories, risk levels, and privacy notes. Used by the cookie information lookup service to identify well-known cookies without requiring an LLM call.
_sources: Peter Lowe's Ad Servers List (https://pgl.yoyo.org/adservers/) — Used with permission
Vendor official documentation (cookie references verified against published SDK docs)

_ga.description: Google Analytics client ID — tracks unique visitors across sessions.

_ga_.description: Google Analytics 4 session cookie — maintains session state for the GA4 measurement ID.

_gid.description: Google Analytics session ID — distinguishes users within a 24-hour window.

_gat.description: Google Analytics throttling cookie — limits request rate.

__utm.description: Google Analytics legacy tracking cookie — records traffic source and campaign data.

_gac_.description: Google Ads conversion cookie — stores campaign information for linking ad clicks to website activity.

_gcl.description: Google Ads conversion linker — connects ad clicks to website actions.

IDE.description: DoubleClick ad-serving cookie — tracks conversions and retargets ads across sites.

DSID.description: DoubleClick session ad cookie — links signed-in Google users to ad interactions.

FLC.description: DoubleClick Floodlight cookie — tracks conversions from display and video ads.

NID.description: Google preferences/advertising cookie — stores settings and ad personalisation data.

ANID.description: Google advertising ID — remembers ad preference settings and delivers personalised ads.

1P_JAR.description: Google advertising cookie — gathers website statistics and tracks conversion rates.

DV.description: Google advertising cookie — collects website statistics and tracks ad personalisation.

__gads.description: DoubleClick for Publishers — monitors ad impressions and measures ad revenue.

test_cookie.description: DoubleClick test cookie — checks whether the browser supports third-party cookies for ad delivery.

GoogleAdServingTest.description: Google ad test cookie — registers which ads have been displayed to the user.

SID.description: Google session ID — used for security, ad targeting, and fraud prevention across Google services.

HSID.description: Google HTTP session ID — used for security and advertising across Google services.

SSID.description: Google secure session ID — collects visitor information for ads and security.

APISID.description: Google API session ID — used to personalise Google ads on non-Google sites.

SAPISID.description: Google secure API session ID — enables ad personalisation on partner websites.

_fbp.description: Facebook Pixel browser ID — tracks visits for ad targeting across the web.

_fbc.description: Facebook click identifier — links ad clicks to on-site conversions.

fr.description: Facebook primary advertising cookie — enables ad delivery, measurement, and cross-site tracking.

datr.description: Facebook browser identification cookie — identifies the browser for security, integrity, and advertising.

usida.description: Facebook user identification for advertising — collects browser and unique identifier data for ad targeting.

_uet.description: Microsoft Bing UET tag — tracks conversions from Bing Ads.

MUID.description: Microsoft unique ID — identifies unique browsers visiting Microsoft sites for advertising and analytics.

MUIDB.description: Microsoft unique ID backup — secondary browser identifier for advertising and analytics.

MR.description: Microsoft analytics cookie — collects information for analytics and advertising purposes.

SRM_B.description: Microsoft tracking cookie — collects data on user behaviour across sites for ad targeting.

MSPTC.description: Microsoft click tracking cookie — registers data on visitors to optimise ad relevance.

_clck.description: Microsoft Clarity user ID — persists visitor identity for behaviour recording.

_clsk.description: Microsoft Clarity session cookie — groups interactions into session replays.

CLID.description: Microsoft Clarity persistent ID — identifies returning users for session replay analytics.

_hjid.description: Hotjar user ID — identifies returning visitors for session replay and heatmaps.

_hjSession.description: Hotjar session cookie — groups page views into a single session recording.

_hjAbsoluteSessionInProgress.description: Hotjar session tracking — detects the beginning of a user's journey for total session count.

_hjFirstSeen.description: Hotjar first visit cookie — identifies the start of a new user session.

_hjIncludedInSessionSample.description: Hotjar sampling cookie — determines if the visitor is included in data sampling for session recording.

_hjHasCachedUserAttributes.description: Hotjar attribute cache — tracks whether cached user attributes are current.

_hjDonePolls.description: Hotjar poll completion cookie — prevents re-showing of completed feedback polls.

personalization_id.description: Twitter/X personalisation cookie — enables targeted ads based on browsing activity.

guest_id.description: Twitter/X guest identifier — tracks unauthenticated users across sites with Twitter widgets.

guest_id_marketing.description: Twitter/X marketing cookie — enables advertising tracking when the user is logged out.

guest_id_ads.description: Twitter/X advertising cookie — enables ad targeting based on cross-site browsing behaviour.

muc_ads.description: Twitter/X ad cookie — collects advertising data across partner sites.

lidc.description: LinkedIn data centre routing cookie — also used for analytics.

bcookie.description: LinkedIn browser identifier — tracks unique browsers for security and analytics.

bscookie.description: LinkedIn secure browser cookie — browser identifier used with the secure flag for tracking.

UserMatchHistory.description: LinkedIn Ads audience matching — syncs ad targeting data to identify users for campaign delivery.

AnalyticsSyncHistory.description: LinkedIn analytics sync — stores data about the time a sync took place for analytics purposes.

li_sugr.description: LinkedIn browser ID for non-members — identifies browsers without a LinkedIn account for ad targeting.

li_oatml.description: LinkedIn member data — collects information about how visitors use the site for advertising.

s_vi.description: Adobe Analytics unique visitor ID — identifies unique visitors across sessions.

s_fid.description: Adobe Analytics fallback visitor ID — used when standard visitor ID methods fail.

s_cc.description: Adobe Analytics cookie check — determines whether cookies are enabled in the browser.

s_sq.description: Adobe Analytics click tracking — records the previous link clicked by the visitor.

s_ppv.description: Adobe Analytics page view — stores information on the percentage of the page displayed.

s_ecid.description: Adobe Experience Cloud ID — first-party persistent ID tracking for marketing attribution.

AMCV_.description: Adobe Experience Cloud visitor ID — unique cross-solution visitor identifier for Adobe marketing tools.

aam_uuid.description: Adobe Audience Manager user ID — assigns a unique visitor ID for audience segmentation and ad targeting.

demdex.description: Adobe Audience Manager domain cookie — identifies unique visitors across Adobe DMP-enabled sites.

_ttp.description: TikTok tracking pixel — identifies visitors for ad attribution and conversion measurement.

_tt_enable_cookie.description: TikTok cookie support check — determines whether the browser accepts tracking cookies.

ttwid.description: TikTok widget ID — tracks usage of embedded TikTok content across partner sites.

msToken.description: TikTok multi-site token — collects user behaviour data across websites for ad optimisation.

__hstc.description: HubSpot main tracking cookie — tracks visitors across sessions with a unique ID and session timestamps.

hubspotutk.description: HubSpot visitor ID — keeps track of a visitor's identity and is passed to HubSpot on form submission.

__hssc.description: HubSpot session cookie — tracks the current session number and page views for analytics.

__hssrc.description: HubSpot session reset — determines if the visitor has restarted their browser to begin a new session.

_pin_unauth.description: Pinterest ad tracking — registers unauthenticated visitors for ad retargeting and remarketing.

_pinterest_sess.description: Pinterest session cookie — collects anonymous visit data for analytics and ad personalisation.

cto_bundle.description: Criteo retargeting bundle — stores browsing and product data for personalised ad retargeting.

cto_bidid.description: Criteo bid ID — manages real-time bidding data for programmatic advertising.

cto_tld_test.description: Criteo top-level domain test — identifies the broadest domain for setting tracking cookies.

_pk_id.description: Matomo visitor ID — stores a unique visitor identifier for web analytics across sessions.

_pk_ses.description: Matomo session cookie — short-lived cookie used to track active visitor sessions.

_pk_ref.description: Matomo referrer cookie — stores the referral source used to initially visit the website.

VISITOR_INFO1_LIVE.description: YouTube visitor cookie — estimates user bandwidth and tracks video interactions for marketing.

YSC.description: YouTube session cookie — tracks views of embedded YouTube videos on third-party sites.

GPS.description: YouTube geolocation cookie — registers a unique ID on mobile devices for tracking based on GPS location.

_rdt_uuid.description: Reddit conversion tracking — identifies visitors for ad remarketing and conversion measurement.

_scid.description: Snapchat Pixel cookie ID — tracks visitors across sites for ad attribution and conversion measurement.

_scid_r.description: Snapchat Pixel referrer cookie — supplements the Snap Pixel ID with additional session context.

t_gid.description: Taboola global visitor ID — assigns a unique ID for content recommendation tracking and ad targeting.

taboola_fp_td_user_id.description: Taboola first-party user ID — tracks users for personalised content recommendations and advertising.

obuid.description: Outbrain user ID — holds an anonymous user identifier for tracking clicks on content recommendations.

AMP_.description: Amplitude analytics ID — registers statistical data on user behaviour for product analytics.

ajs_anonymous_id.description: Segment anonymous visitor ID — assigns a UUID to unauthenticated visitors for analytics across tools.

ajs_user_id.description: Segment authenticated user ID — ties analytics events to a known user identity across platforms.

uid.description: Adform unique user ID — contains a unique identifier to track users for ad retargeting.

C.description: Adform cookie check — determines whether the user's browser supports cookies for ad serving.

cref.description: Quantcast content reference — contains data on user navigation for ad optimisation and statistics.

khaos.description: Magnite (Rubicon Project) campaign tracking — tracks advertising campaigns and collects anonymised user statistics.

put_.description: Magnite user sync cookie — records anonymised user data for ad optimisation across partner networks.

KRTBCOOKIE_.description: PubMatic user ID sync — registers an identifier for real-time ad bidding across exchanges.

KADUSERCOOKIE.description: PubMatic user cookie — assigns a unique user ID for targeted ad delivery.

_ceir.description: Crazy Egg returning visitor check — tracks whether a visitor has visited the site before.

_ce.s.description: Crazy Egg session recording — tracks the visitor session unique ID, host, and start time.

_cs_id.description: ContentSquare user ID — contains user ID, creation timestamp, and visit count for analytics.

_cs_s.description: ContentSquare session cookie — records the number of page views and recording state for the current session.

A3.description: Yahoo advertising targeting cookie — collects data for ad retargeting and personalisation.

prism_.description: ActiveCampaign site tracking — tracks visitor behaviour for marketing automation and email targeting.

__kla_id.description: Klaviyo visitor ID — tracks site visitors and can hold personally identifiable information once identified.

_mkto_trk.description: Marketo (Salesforce) tracking cookie — tracks visitor behaviour for lead scoring and marketing automation.

_pendo_visitorId.description: Pendo visitor identifier — persistent ID for tracking individual users across sessions in product analytics.

_pendo_accountId.description: Pendo account identifier — links users to their company/account for B2B product analytics.

_pendo_meta.description: Pendo metadata — session metadata and guide interaction state.

_vwo_uuid.description: VWO visitor UUID — persistent unique identifier for A/B test participant tracking.

_vwo_uuid_v2.description: VWO visitor UUID v2 — updated unique identifier format for A/B testing.

_vwo_ds.description: VWO data store — serialised experiment assignment and variation data.

_vwo_sn.description: VWO session number — tracks the number of sessions for a visitor.

_vis_opt_exp.description: VWO experiment cookie — stores which A/B test variation was served to the visitor.

_vis_opt_s.description: VWO session cookie — tracks active session state for experiment participation.

_vis_opt_test_cookie.description: VWO test cookie — checks whether cookies are enabled in the browser.

__insp_uid.description: Inspectlet user identifier — persistent ID for session replay and heatmap analytics.

__insp_nv.description: Inspectlet new visitor flag — distinguishes first-time visitors from returning users.

__insp_sid.description: Inspectlet session ID — unique identifier for the current session replay recording.

__insp_slim.description: Inspectlet slim data — compressed session metadata for replay.

utag_main.description: Tealium main cookie — stores visitor ID, session count, and last visit timestamp for tag management.

TEALIUM_TIMING.description: Tealium page timing data — captures performance metrics for tag loading.

_branch_match_id.description: Branch.io match ID — cross-platform attribution identifier linking web visits to mobile app installs.

__qca.description: Quantcast audience measurement — persistent identifier for demographic profiling and audience segmentation.

_lr_tabs_.description: LogRocket tab tracking — coordinates session replay recording across browser tabs.

_lr_uf_.description: LogRocket user flags — stores feature flags and user metadata for session replay context.

_lr_hb_.description: LogRocket heartbeat — session keepalive and recording state.

_lr_env_.description: LogRocket environment — stores deployment environment context for session replay.

_abck.description: Akamai Bot Manager cookie — stores bot detection signals including browser fingerprinting, behavioural analysis, and device characteristics.

bm_sz.description: Akamai Bot Manager size cookie — captures viewport and screen dimensions for bot detection fingerprinting.

ak_bmsc.description: Akamai Bot Manager session cookie — session-scoped bot signal collection.

_lfa.description: Leadfeeder analytics — B2B website visitor identification linking IP addresses and browsing behaviour to company profiles.

_lfa_test_cookie_stored.description: Leadfeeder cookie test — checks cookie storage capability.

_evidon_consent_cookie.description: Evidon (Crownpeak) consent tracking — records consent state and cookie category preferences.

intercom-id-.description: Intercom messenger identity — persistent visitor ID for personalised messaging and chat history.

intercom-session-.description: Intercom session cookie — session state for the Intercom messenger widget.

intercom-device-id-.description: Intercom device identifier — cross-session device tracking for the messaging platform.

mp_mixpanel.description: Mixpanel analytics cookie — stores distinct ID, device ID, and tracking configuration. Property-ID-specific cookie.

adjust_device_id.description: Adjust device identifier — cross-session device tracking for mobile attribution.

__pc.description: Piano composer — stores user access state and metered paywall counter.

__pnahc.description: Piano analytics — hashed content identifier for engagement tracking.

__tbc.description: Piano (formerly Tinypass) browser cookie — persistent visitor identity for subscription and paywall tracking.

walkme_.description: WalkMe digital adoption tracking — stores user interaction state, guide progress, and workflow analytics.

xnpe_.description: Exponea (Bloomreach) persistent cookie — tracks user identity and consent state for the customer data platform.

__exponea_etc__.description: Exponea cross-domain tracking — maintains user identity across multiple websites.

__exponea_time2__.description: Exponea session timing — tracks session start and engagement duration.

privacy_notes.analytics: Collects usage data that can profile browsing behaviour over time.
privacy_notes.advertising: Enables cross-site tracking and ad targeting based on your browsing history.
privacy_notes.fingerprinting: Records detailed interaction data including mouse movements, clicks, and scrolling.
privacy_notes.social-media: Allows social platforms to track your activity on third-party sites.
